title: Pro Warrior Cup/Season 1

[https://www.irony.in/ Irony Esports] |mode=squads |prizepoolusd= |perspective=tpp |localcurrency=inr |prizepool=5,00,000 |country=India |sdate=2022-02-06 |edate=2022-02-10 |twitter= |discord=https://discord.gg/FHUzE3gUZd |instagram=warmania_esp |web= |loco=WHHOBQPFQP |facebook= |youtube=c/WARMANIAOFFICIAL |previous= }} War Mania in association with [https://www.fastrack.in/shop/reflex-vox-smart-watch/ Fastrack Reflex Vox] presents the 1st season of '''Pro Warrior Cup''' prizepool of 5,00,000 INR. ==About== ===Broadcast Talent=== {{box|start|padding=1em}} {{broadcasterCard |position=Hindi Commentator |b1=Nitesh Batra|b1name=|b1flag=in |b2=Boss JP|b2name=Jitendra Patel|b2flag=in }} {{box|end}} ===Format=== '''The tournament was divided into three phases.''' *'''Round 1''' ** ''A total of 6420 teams will play in Qualifiers Round 1'' ** {{bgcolortext|up|Top 6 teams}} ''made it to Phase 2'' *'''Round 2''' **''There were 24 teams invited, from the CONQUEST ROUND andand the'' **{{bgcolortext|up|''Top 16 teams}} qualify for the ULTIMATE ROUND.'' *'''Round 3''' **'''Top 16 from Round 2''' **'''2 Teams Invited through Viewers Voting''' **'''Teams will get to play a total of 16 matches in a period of 4 days''' **'''Each day will feature a total of 4 matches''' ====Points Distribution==== {{{title|For {{abbr|"Points Matrix"|Points Matrix}} '''Click here'''.}}}
{| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center;" ! colspan="2"|Points Distribution |- |'''''Finish Points''''' ||''1 per finish'' |- !width=100px|Place !width=100px|Points |- |{{Placement|1}}||15 |- |{{Placement|2}}||12 |- |{{Placement|3}}||10 |- |{{Placement|4}}||8 |- |{{Placement|5}}||6 |- |{{Placement|6}}||4 |- |{{Placement|7}}||2 |- |{{Placement|8-12}}||1 |- |{{Placement|13-18}}||0 |}
